center.name: Doce River
center.summary: Doce River是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括黄腿穴䳍、索里塔馬藍灰蟻鵙，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Sooretama slaty antshrike is found in southeastern Brazil coastally from southern Sergipe to Rio de Janeiro state and inland up the Doce River valley in Minas Gerais

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: noctivagus, the nominate race, occurs in southeastern Brazil: Minas Gerais (Doce River area), southern Bahia, Espírito Santo, Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo, Paraná, Santa Catarina, and Rio Grande do Sul. * C
